name: Lemon Berry Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Philadelphia Brand Cream Cheese, softened
8 ounces Cool Whip Whipped Topping (thawed), 1 tub
6 ounces Prepared Graham Cracker Crumb Crust
2 packages JELL-O Vanilla or Lemon Flavor Instant Pudding and Pie Filling
recipeInstructions:
- Soften cream cheese in microwave on HIGH for 15-20 seconds.
1. Beat the cream cheese, 1 tablespoon milk, and sugar in a medium bowl with a wire whisk until smooth. Stir in lemon peel and juice. Stir in 1 1/2 cups of the whipped topping. Spread evenly in the bottom of the crust. Press strawberry halves into the cream cheese layer, reserving several for garnish if desired.
2. Pour 2 cups milk into a large bowl. Add pudding mixes. Beat with a wire whisk for 1 minute. Let stand for 1 minute or until thickened. Gently stir in 1 cup of the whipped topping. Spoon over strawberries in the crust.
3. Refrigerate 4 hours or until set. Garnish with remaining whipped topping and reserved strawberry halves. Store leftover pie in refrigerator.
To Prepare with JELL-O Brand Sugar Free Pudding:
Follow the instructions above, using JELL-O Vanilla Flavor Sugar Free Instant Reduced Calorie Pudding & Pie Filling and Cool Whip Lite Whipped Topping. Substitute Light Philadelphia Brand Neufchatel Cheese for the cream cheese.
